description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a gable roof, set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and hedges outlining the property. The front facade features a small covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by symmetrical windows. The roof is pitched and extends over the porch, with two visible chimneys rising from different sections. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage structure on one side, and a fenced area with a gate at the front. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the brown roof and green landscaping. The rear of the bungalow has additional windows and a secondary entrance, with the overall layout emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by hedges and a driveway leading to a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a hedge-lined walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the pitched roof, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the garage structure to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roofline, and the fenced property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
